title: OHLCResponse
description: Response from the OHLC (Open, High, Low, Close) exchange rates endpoint

start_time.description: Start time of the OHLC period in ISO-8601 UTC format

end_time.description: End time of the OHLC period in ISO-8601 UTC format

rates.description: Map of currency codes to OHLC data objects

open.description: Opening exchange rate at the start of the period

high.description: Highest exchange rate recorded during the period

low.description: Lowest exchange rate recorded during the period

close.description: Closing exchange rate at the end of the period

average.description: Average exchange rate over the period
